name: intentmodel
description: Amy — the assistant who speaks AIM — plus the Architect / Developer / Reviewer / Encoder modes.

plugins.name: amy
plugins.description: One assistant for intent-driven development: describe what you want and Amy designs the intent, builds code from it, reviews code against it, or reverse-engineers a codebase into it — grounded in versioned .aim files so drift is a graph-diff, not a hallucination.
